steps.title: Match opportunity language
steps.content: The claim says several beneficial opportunities have recently become available to women. The quotation must show fields becoming open to women and present that opening as positive, matching both the number and benefit of the opportunities.

steps.title: Reject unrelated quotations
steps.content: A describes ambition arising after criticism of women's sphere, not opportunities opening. C describes an inherent domain, not newly available fields. D is from a different poem and does not address women's opportunities. The line about trade, science, craft, and art opening their doors fits. The answer is B.
